text: Stepping into this space, I am keenly aware of the interplay between order and curiosity—glass and concrete separating me from bright displays and projected images, inviting yet slightly distant. As I move closer, the colorful wall under the bold 'R+D' sign radiates intellect and invites me to ponder innovation. Quotes and text fragments highlight the human urge to observe, organize, and reflect, even in mundane settings. I feel both detached—an observer drawn into someone else's narrative—and gently inspired, reminded that all routines, when viewed deeply, open doors to wonder.
